allow: Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\); const s=new net.Socket\(\); s.setTimeout\(3000\); s.connect\(5432,''127.0.0.1'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''TCP OK - puerto 5432 accesible''\); s.destroy\(\)}\); s.on\(''error'',e=>console.error\(''TCP ERROR:'',e.message\)\); s.on\(''timeout'',\(\)=>console.error\(''TCP TIMEOUT''\)\)")
